en: but from the very start of Trump's second term, it was clear they had much bigger plans for DHS,
ko: 하지만 트럼프 2기 초부터 DHS에 대해 훨씬 큰 계획이 있다는 게 분명했어.

en: starting with the fact Trump put one of his biggest allies, Kristi Noem, in charge of it.
And even news stories about her announcement at the time contained some pretty clear hints that she was a bad choice.
Tonight, President-elect Donald Trump expected to name one of his staunchest campaign supporters.
Are you ready? South Dakota Governor Kristi Noem to lead the massive Department of Homeland Security.
ko: 오늘 밤 트럼프 대통령 당선인이 가장 열렬한 선거 지지자 중 한 명인 사우스다코타 주지사 크리스티 놈을

en: Trump once considered Noem as a potential running mate, but her star dimmed after writing in her memoir
ko: 거대한 국토안보부 수장으로 지명할 예정입니다. 트럼프는 한때 놈을 러닝메이트로 고려했지만

en: that she had shot and killed the family dog.
ko: 회고록에 집 개를 총으로 쏴 죽였다고 쓴 후 그녀의 주가가 떨어졌어.

en: Yeah, not great. Trump was so turned off by Noem's dog news, he apparently said to Don Jr. afterwards,
ko: 좋지 않지. 트럼프는 놈의 개 뉴스에 너무 실망해서 돈 주니어에게 "전혀 좋지 않아. 너도 개는 안 죽이잖아. 넌 다 죽이면서"라고 했대.

en: that's not good at all. Even you wouldn't kill a dog, and you kill everything.
ko: 숙련된 치료사가 "차칭"이라고 묘사할 가족 역학을 잠깐 엿보는 거야.

en: Just another brief window into a family dynamic that a skilled therapist would describe as cha-ching.
ko: 결정적으로 놈은 개 살해 외에 관련 경험이 별로 없었어.

en: And crucially, Noem didn't bring a lot of non-dog-murdering experience to the job.
ko: DHS나 법 집행 분야에서 일한 적이 없었지만 사우스다코타 주지사로서

en: She'd never worked in DHS, or indeed, law enforcement, but in a foreshadowing of things to come,
ko: 끊임없는 자기 홍보를 했어. 주 홍보 광고에서 치과의사, 간호사, 전기기사, 배관공, 용접공, 건설 노동자 등

en: as governor of South Dakota, she was a relentless self-promoter.
In ads for her state, she appeared in various job-themed costumes, including a dentist, a nurse,
ko: 다양한 직업 코스튬을 입고 나와서 놀라운 카리스마로 각 역할을 소화했어.

en: an electrician, a plumber, a welder, and a construction worker, selling each role
ko: 그리고 놈은 DHS에 바로 그 끊임없는 PR 집중력을 가져왔어.

en: with incredible charisma. And the thing is, Noem immediately brought to DHS
ko: 5만 달러짜리 롤렉스를 차고 엘살바도르 감옥에서 영상을 찍거나 법 집행관 코스프레를 하거나

en: that same unrelenting focus on PR, from shooting a video in the Salvadoran Socot prison
while wearing a $50,000 Rolex, to cosplaying
ko: 뉴욕 거리에서 방탄조끼를 입거나 해안경비대 전투복을 입거나 폭스뉴스에서 국경순찰대원 복장을 하거나.

en: as a law enforcement agent, from wearing a bulletproof vest
on the streets of New York, to putting on Coast Guard fatigues, to dressing up like a border patrol agent on Fox News.
ko: 어디에나 카메라를 데리고 다니는 것 같은 건 실제로 그러니까. 여기 시카고 외곽 이민자 수용시설 옥상에서 카메라 크루와 함께.

en: And if it seems like she's got cameras with her wherever she goes, it's because she basically does.
ko: 그리고 재미있는 사실, 이 두 남자 칼 프랜코비치와 후안 무뇨스는 그날 밖에서 시위하다 체포됐어.

en: Here she is with a camera crew on the roof of an immigration detention facility outside of Chicago.
ko: 그들 말에 따르면 그들의 행동보다는 놈과 소셜미디어 크루의 존재 때문이었대.

en: And fun fact, these two men, Carl Frankovich and Juan Munoz, were protesting outside that day, only to be arrested.
ko: 요원이 나를 잡아서 넘어뜨렸어요. 그리고 케이블 타이로 구금됐어요.

en: And to hear them tell it, that seemed to have less to do with their actions, and much more to do
ko: 바닥에 끌려갔어요.

en: with the presence of Noem and her social media crew.
An agent grabbed me, threw me down. I was then zip-tied and detained.
ko: 그리고 체포 명령을 받았어요. 우리가 정치적 연극에 이용되는 느낌이었어요.

en: I was pulled to the ground, um...
ko: 크리스티 놈이 사진작가와 촬영기사들에 둘러싸여 지나가면서 우리를 배경으로 깔고 갔어요.

en: and ordered arrested. It felt very much like we were just being used for this political theater.
ko: 그리고 이게 벌어졌어요. 국토안보부가 카일이 수갑 찬 소셜미디어 게시물을 올렸어요.

en: Kristi Noem was able to walk past us, surrounded by photographers, videographers,
ko: "폭력적인 활동가들이 법 집행관에게 손을 대는 것을 허용하지 않겠다"라고 썼고 홍보 영상도 올렸어요.

en: essentially just getting us in the background as she walked by. Then look what happened.
Homeland Security sent out these social media posts, showing Kyle in handcuffs.
ko: 거기 카일이 또 나와요. 그와 무뇨스는 어떤 혐의도 받지 않았어.

en: This one said, we will not allow violent activists to lay hands on our law enforcement.
ko: 사실이야. 폭력적인 활동가로 낙인찍혔지만 아무 혐의도 없었어. 그냥 크리스티 놈의 사진 촬영을 위해 체포된 것 같아.

en: And they also posted this government promotional video.
And there's Kyle again. He and Munoz were never charged with any crime.
ko: 그녀 자신의 개의 유언을 인용하자면 러프(거칠어/멍멍).

en: That's true. Despite being labeled violent activists, they were never charged with anything.
So it seems they were arrested just for a photo op for Kristi Noem, which is, if I may quote
her own dog's dying words, -"rough." -$ROUGH!
